articles.headline: World Cup 2026 referees: Complete list of officials and VAR teams
articles.description: Find out who the 170 officials are for the 2026 World Cup and when will we find out who is refereeing which game?

images.name: A general view of the FIFA World Cup trophy on display prior to the FIFA World Cup 2026 Play-Off Tournament and European Play-Off Draw at Home of FIFA [1296x729]
images.caption: The 2026 World Cup begins on June 11 and ends on July 19 when the final will be played at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.
images.alt: A general view of the FIFA World Cup trophy on display prior to the FIFA World Cup 2026 Play-Off Tournament and European Play-Off Draw at Home of FIFA
images.credit: Marcio Machado - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Siphiwe Tshabalala [1296x729]
images.alt: Siphiwe Tshabalala of South Africa celebrates after scoring the opening goal while Ricardo Osorio (R) and goalkeeper Oscar Perez of Mexico look dejected during the 2010 FIFA World Cup South Africa Group A match between South Africa and Mexico at Soccer Ci
images.credit: Jamie Squire - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

articles.headline: Scaloni: Argentina 'will give everything' in Egypt clash
articles.description: Scaloni: Argentina 'will give everything' in Egypt clash

images.name: Scaloni: Argentina 'will give everything' in Egypt clash
images.caption: Scaloni: Argentina 'will give everything' in Egypt clash

articles.headline: Why are there hydration breaks at the 2026 World Cup, and why has FIFA been criticised?
articles.description: All 104 matches at the 2026 World Cup are stopping for two hydration breaks. Why have they been stipulated by FIFA, and why have they been criticised?

images.name:
Players of Tunisia take drinks at the hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group F match between Sweden and Tunisia at Monterrey Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.alt: Players of Tunisia take drinks at the hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group F match between Sweden and Tunisia at Monterrey Stadium

images.name: Enzo Fernandez #8 of Chelsea FC drinks water in a hydration break during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 semi-final match between Fluminense FC and Chelsea FC at MetLife Stadium [1296x729]
images.caption: Argentina's Enzo Fernández said he felt "dizzy" while playing in "very dangerous" temperatures during last summer's Club World Cup in the United States.
images.alt: Enzo Fernandez #8 of Chelsea FC drinks water in a hydration break during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 semi-final match between Fluminense FC and Chelsea FC at MetLife Stadium

images.name:
Electronic screen displaying hydration break information during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Haiti and Scotland at Boston Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Advertising is prominent on stadium screens during drinks breaks at the World Cup.
images.alt: Electronic screen displaying hydration break information during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Haiti and Scotland at Boston Stadium

images.name:
Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) looks on during Group F FIFA World Cup 2026, Netherlands and Japan, Dallas Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Virgil van Dijk has been critical of the hydration breaks introduced at this summer's World Cup.
images.alt: Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) looks on during Group F FIFA World Cup 2026, Netherlands and Japan, Dallas Stadium

images.name:
The Brazil team talk during a hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Carlo Ancelotti was thankful for the opportunity to speak to his players when Brazil found themselves a goal behind to Morocco in the first half of their World Cup opener.
images.alt: The Brazil team talk during a hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium

images.name:
Myung-Bo Hong, Head Coach of Korea Republic, gives his players instructions during a hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Hydration breaks provide a window for coaches to gather their players and tweak their tactics.
images.alt: Myung-Bo Hong, Head Coach of Korea Republic, gives his players instructions during a hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia

images.name:
Germany's forward #26 Deniz Undav, Germany's midfielder #13 Pascal Gross, Germany's midfielder #17 Florian Wirtz, Germany's midfielder #05 Aleksandar Pavlovic and teammates celebrate
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Drinks breaks could have a major effect on the outcome of matches at the World Cup.
images.alt: Germany's forward #26 Deniz Undav, Germany's midfielder #13 Pascal Gross, Germany's midfielder #17 Florian Wirtz, Germany's midfielder #05 Aleksandar Pavlovic and teammates celebrate
images.credit: Kirill KUDRYAVTSEV / AFP via Getty Images

articles.headline: Free World Cup 2026 predictor: Simulate your road to the final
articles.description: Put your football knowledge to the test with ESPN's free World Cup 2026 predictor games and forecast every twist and turn of the tournament.

images.name: Messi Argentina [1296x729]
images.caption: Once the group stage finishes, fill out your selections in the Knockout Bracket Challenge.

images.name: World Cup group stage challenge [642x361]
images.caption: Predict the final standings in every group by dragging and dropping the teams into first through fourth.
images.alt: Predict the final standings in every group by dragging and dropping the teams into first through fourth.

articles.headline: Neymar was Ancelotti's gamble at the World Cup, and it failed
articles.description: Carlo Ancelotti calling up Neymar to Brazil's World Cup squad was always a risk, and it backfired badly when they got eliminated to Norway in the round of 16.

images.name: Neymar [1296x729]
images.credit: (Photo by Tom Weller/picture alliance via Getty Images)

images.name: Why Brazil's loss to Norway is so disappointing
images.caption: Why Brazil's loss to Norway is so disappointing

article.story:
Morocco progressed to the last 16 of the World Cup in a thrilling penalty shootout victory over the Netherlands after the sides drew 1-1 in Guadalupe, Mexico.

Morocco edged past the Dutch 3-2 on penalties, Ismael Saibari claiming the decisive goal after multiple missed opportunities and saves on both sides.

The first half was marked by physicality, with momentum swinging freely but neither side able to impact the scoreboard.

Morocco had a strong chance after the break as a deft through ball created a clear run for Achraf Hakimi, but he sent the ball off the crossbar.

After 72 minutes Morocco looked in clear ascendancy, until a Netherlands goal-kick found substitute Wout Weghorst in the middle of the pitch and his flick header released Crysencio Summerville who drew in the last defender and slipped a ball to Cody Gakpo on his left.

The Liverpool star duly finished the job and was immediately overcome with emotion, days after the 27-year-old and his partner Noa van der Bij announced they had experienced a pregnancy loss.

Momentum had shifted again and it looked a certainty Gakpo's goal would be the decisive one, but a cross in the 90th minute found a charging Issa Diop, whose header found the corner of the goal and ensured the match would go into extra-time.

Morocco looked certain to take the lead in the 97th minute when Soufiane Rahimi's fancy footwork put him one-on-one with Bart Verbruggen, but the Dutch goalkeeper was somehow able to deflect the shot.

The extra 30 minutes was not enough to separate the sides, Morocco advancing to a clash with co-hosts Canada after the shootout.

stats.name: blockedShots
stats.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

stats.name: effectiveClearance
stats.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

stats.name: effectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: inneffectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

stats.name: interceptions
stats.description: The number of interceptions.

stats.name: tacklePct
stats.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: totalClearance
stats.description: The number of clearances attempted.

stats.name: totalTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles attempted.

stats.name: possWonDef3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

stats.name: ballRecovery
stats.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

stats.name: timesTackled
stats.description: The total number of times a player has been tackled.

stats.name: defensiveInterventions
stats.description: The sum of ball recoveries, won tackles, effective clearances, outfielder blocks, blocked crosses, and defensive third duels won.

stats.name: appearances
stats.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

stats.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
stats.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
stats.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromEditor
stats.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromUser
stats.description: The average user rating for a player.

stats.name: dnp
stats.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

stats.name: draws
stats.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

stats.name: foulsCommitted
stats.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

stats.name: foulsSuffered
stats.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

stats.name: goalDifference
stats.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

stats.name: handBalls
stats.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

stats.name: losses
stats.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

stats.name: lostCorners
stats.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

stats.name: minutes
stats.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: passPct
stats.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

stats.name: redCards
stats.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

stats.name: starts
stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.name: subIns
stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.name: subOuts
stats.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

stats.name: suspensions
stats.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

stats.name: timeEnded
stats.description: The time a match ends.

stats.name: timeStarted
stats.description: The time a match starts.

stats.name: winPct
stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.name: wins
stats.description: The number of matches won.

stats.name: wonCorners
stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: cleanSheet
stats.description: The number of times a goalkeeper doesn't let in a goal.

stats.name: crossesCaught
stats.description: The number of crosses claimed.

stats.name: goalsConceded
stats.description: The number of goals allowed by the goalkeeper.

stats.name: partialCleenSheet
stats.description: The number of times a clean sheet is kept when playing at least a part of the game.

stats.name: penaltyKickConceded
stats.description: The number of goals allowed when the opposing team take a penalty.

stats.name: penaltyKickSavePct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks a goalkeeper saves.

stats.name: penaltyKicksFaced
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks faced by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: penaltyKicksSaved
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks saved by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: punches
stats.description: The number of punches.

stats.name: savePct
stats.description: The percentage of shots on target that are saved by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: saves
stats.description: The number of times a goalkeeper makes a save.

stats.name: shootOutKicksFaced
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks faced in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shootOutKicksSaved
stats.description: The number of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shootOutSavePct
stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks saved in a penalty shootout.

stats.name: shotsFaced
stats.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

stats.name: smothers
stats.description: The number of smothers.

stats.name: unclaimedCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses that were unclaimed.

stats.name: expectedGoalsConceded
stats.description: Total Expected Goals Against

stats.name: expectedGoalsNonPenaltyConceded
stats.description: Total Expected Goals Against excluding penalties

stats.name: expectedGoalsOnTargetConceded
stats.description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against

stats.name: expectedGoalsOnTargetNonPenaltyConceded
stats.description: Total Expected Goals on Target Against excluding penalties

stats.name: bigChanceSaves
stats.description: Count of major scoring chances saved by the player (usually goalkeepers)

stats.name: goalsPrevented
stats.description: The difference between goals on target and actual goals conceded by a goalkeeper.

stats.name: shotsOnGoalAgainst
stats.description: The number of shots on goal the opposing team has had against this team

stats.name: accurateCrosses
stats.description: The number of crosses that find their target.

stats.name: accurateLongBalls
stats.description: The number of longballs that are completed.

stats.name: accuratePasses
stats.description: The number of passes completed.

stats.name: accurateThroughBalls
stats.description: The number of through balls that find their target.

stats.name: attemptsInBox
stats.description: The number of attempts from in the box.

stats.name: attemptsOutBox
stats.description: The number of attempts from out of the box.

stats.name: crossPct
stats.description: The percentage of crosses that find their target.

stats.name: freeKickGoals
stats.description: The number goals scored from free kick shots.

stats.name: freeKickPct
stats.description: The percentage of free kick shots that .

stats.name: freeKickShots
stats.description: The number of free kick shots attempted.

stats.name: gameWinningAssists
stats.description: The number of game winning assists.

stats.name: gameWinningGoals
stats.description: The number of game winning goals.

stats.name: goalAssists
stats.description: The number of assists.

stats.name: headedGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored from headers.

stats.name: inaccurateCrosses
stats.description: The number of times a cross was attempted and failed to find its target.

stats.name: inaccurateLongBalls
stats.description: The number of times a long ball was attempted and failed to be completed

stats.name: inaccuratePasses
stats.description: The number of times a pass was attempted and failed to find its target.

stats.name: inaccurateThroughBalls
stats.description: The number of times a through ball was attempted and failed to be completed.

stats.name: leftFootedShots
stats.description: The number of shots attempted with a player's left foot.

stats.name: longballPct
stats.description: The percentage of long balls attempted that find their target.

stats.name: offsides
stats.description: The number of times a player or team gets caught offside.

stats.description: The number of goals scored from the penalty spot.

stats.description: The percentage of penalty kicks converted.

stats.description: The number of penalty kicks attempted.

stats.name: starts
stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.
